Sender: P. Lacau, Director General of the Antiquities Service
Recipient: Monsieur E. Baraize, Directeur de Travaux
Brief_Summary: This service order allocates L.E. 200 to Mr. Baraize for work at the Osireion in Abydos and assigns Mohammed Eff. Ahmed Ibrahim to the site. A copy of the order is transmitted to Mr. Baraize for his information and necessary action.
English_Translation:
Cairo, April 7, 1926.
[Handwritten Arabic: Department of Antiquities]

ANTIQUITIES SERVICE
---------
General Directorate

[Pencil note: 42.80/27]

Subject:
SERVICE ORDER N° 469

A sum of L.E. 200 is placed at the disposal of Mr. Baraize for the work at the Osireion in Abydos.
He will employ Mohammed Eff. Ahmed Ibrahim on this site.
Cairo, April 28, 1926.
THE DIRECTOR GENERAL,
signed: P. Lacau.
--------------------

Copy transmitted to Mr. E. Baraize, for information and necessary action.

For THE DIRECTOR GENERAL,
[Handwritten signature: C.L. Edgar]
Full_Transcription:
Le Caire, le 7 Avril 1926.
[Handwritten Arabic: مصلحة]
[Handwritten Arabic: آثار]

SERVICE DES ANTIQUITES
---------
Direction Générale

[Pencil note: 42.80/27]

Objet :
O R D R E D E S E R V I C E N° [Handwritten: 469]

Une somme de L.E.200 est mise à la disposition
de M.Baraize pour les travaux de l'Osiréion à
Abydos.
Il emploiera sur ce chantier Mohammed Eff.
Ahmed Ibrahim.
Le Caire, le 28 Avril 1926.
LE DIRECTEUR GENERAL,
signé : P.Lacau.
--------------------

Copie transmise à M.E.Baraize, pour information
et suite nécessaire.

Pr. LE DIRECTEUR GENERAL,
[Handwritten signature: C.L. Edgar]
